name: kweiza-cc-plugins
description: Custom Claude Code plugins collection by kweiza

plugins.name: grafik-bar
plugins.description: Graphical status line (model, effort, context, rate limits, workspace, git branch, session stats) — auto-installs via a SessionStart hook, no setup command needed

plugins.name: session-handoff
plugins.description: End-of-session handoff — save progress, plan next session, write starter prompt
